issues: sub-spec 1/10: CRITICAL C1: Tailwind v4 uses CSS-based @theme config, not tailwind.config.ts — entire config strategy (SS-01, SS-06, SS-08) uses wrong API, CRITICAL C2: Token names --color-muted, --color-destructive, --color-background don't exist in theme.css — actual names are --color-text-muted, --color-danger, --color-bg, CRITICAL C3: src/App.tsx path is wrong — actual path is src/app/App.tsx (SS-04 AC 4.4), CRITICAL C4: src/db/ and src/repositories/ paths don't exist — actual paths are src/storage/db/ and src/storage/repositories/ (SS-04 AC 4.5), CRITICAL C5: Screen filenames don't match actual files — LibraryScreen→CharacterLibraryScreen, NoteEditor→NoteEditorScreen, and MoreScreen + PrintableSheetScreen are missing entirely, CRITICAL C6: Primitives Drawer.tsx, IconButton.tsx, Chip.tsx, CounterControl.tsx have no migration plan but are actively used across 13+ files

sub-spec 2/10: CRITICAL: SS-04 AC 4.4 references src/App.tsx but routes are in src/routes/index.tsx — verification command will produce false results, CRITICAL: SS-04 AC 4.5 references src/db/ and src/repositories/ which don't exist — should be src/storage/, CRITICAL: SS-04 screen names wrong — 'LibraryScreen' should be 'CharacterLibraryScreen', 'NoteEditor' should be 'NoteEditorScreen', CRITICAL: SS-04 missing MoreScreen.tsx and PrintableSheetScreen.tsx from migration list, CRITICAL: src/features/ (229 style={{), src/components/fields/ (136 style={{), and other subdirs not assigned to any sub-spec for migration — massive scope gap, CRITICAL: SS-02 showToast() is in src/context/ToastContext.tsx not Toast.tsx — file not in modification list

sub-spec 4/10: C1: SS-04 references wrong screen filenames (NoteEditor.tsx vs NoteEditorScreen.tsx, LibraryScreen.tsx vs CharacterLibraryScreen.tsx), C2: 41+ files with style={{ in src/components/fields/, src/features/, src/components/modals/, src/components/notes/, src/components/layout/ are not covered by any sub-spec, but master spec final grep covers src/components/, C3: MoreScreen.tsx and PrintableSheetScreen.tsx exist but are not enumerated in SS-04 migration order, C4: Token names --color-destructive and --color-background referenced in specs do not exist in theme.css (actual: --color-danger and --color-bg), C5: Tailwind v4 uses CSS-based @theme configuration, not tailwind.config.ts — entire foundation approach is v3-style and will fail with v4, C6: Drawer.tsx, IconButton.tsx, Chip.tsx, CounterControl.tsx in primitives/ not scoped in SS-02 despite Drawer being used in 21+ files
